terms.meta_description: Terms and conditions governing the use of our community timebanking platform.
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules and guidelines for using our platform
terms.welcome_body_1: By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before participating in our community.
terms.welcome_body_2_before: These terms establish a framework for
terms.welcome_body_2_after: between community members. Our goal is to create a trusted environment where everyone's time is valued equally.
terms.section1_intro_before: Our platform operates on a simple but powerful principle:
terms.credits_no_monetary_value: Time Credits have no monetary value and cannot be exchanged for cash. They exist solely to facilitate community exchanges.
terms.credit_rule_1: One hour of service provided equals one Time Credit earned
terms.credit_rule_2: Credits can be used to receive services from other members
terms.credit_rule_3: The type of service does not affect the credit value
terms.credit_rule_4: Credits are tracked automatically through the platform
terms.section2_intro: When you create an account, you agree to:
terms.account_accurate_desc: Your profile must reflect your true identity and skills
terms.account_security_desc: Keep your login credentials confidential and secure
terms.account_one_account_desc: Each person may only maintain one active account
terms.account_current_desc: Update your profile when your skills or availability change
terms.account_reachable_desc: Respond to messages and requests in a timely manner
terms.guideline_respect_desc: Be kind and courteous in all interactions
terms.guideline_honour_desc: If you agree to an exchange, follow through
terms.guideline_communicate_desc: Keep other members informed about your availability
terms.guideline_inclusive_desc: Welcome members of all backgrounds and abilities
terms.guideline_feedback_desc: Help the community by providing fair reviews
terms.section4_intro: The following activities are strictly prohibited and may result in account termination:
terms.section5_intro: Your safety is important. We recommend following these guidelines:
terms.safety_first_meetings_desc: Meet in public places for initial exchanges
terms.safety_verify_desc: Confirm the member's profile before meeting
terms.safety_instincts_desc: If something feels wrong, do not proceed
terms.safety_report_desc: Let us know about any suspicious behaviour
terms.section6_intro: {{name}} provides a platform for community members to connect and exchange services. However:
terms.liability_no_guarantee: We do not guarantee the quality or safety of any services exchanged
terms.liability_no_disputes: We are not responsible for disputes between members
terms.liability_own_risk: Members exchange services at their own risk
terms.liability_insurance: We recommend obtaining appropriate insurance for professional services
terms.liability_hold_harmless: By using the platform, you agree to hold {{name}} harmless from any claims arising from your participation in service exchanges.
terms.section7_intro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Reasons for termination include:
terms.termination_self_close: You may also close your account at any time through your account settings.
terms.section8_intro: We may update these terms from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. When we make significant changes:
terms.changes_notify: We will notify you via email or platform notification
terms.changes_date_shown: The updated date will be shown at the top of this page
terms.changes_continued_use: Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the new terms
terms.cta_body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service or need clarification on any points, our team is here to help.

privacy.meta_description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data on our community platform.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
privacy.commitment_body_1: {{name}} is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your personal data is handled responsibly. This policy explains what information we collect, why we collect it, and how you can manage your data.
privacy.commitment_body_2_after: You have the right to understand and manage how your information is used.
privacy.data_collection_intro: We collect only the information necessary to provide and improve our services:
privacy.data_account_why: Required to create and manage your account
privacy.data_profile_why: Helps connect you with community members
privacy.data_device_collected: Browser type, IP address, device type
privacy.data_analytics_collected: Pages visited, features used, session duration
privacy.data_usage_intro: Your data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy.usage_delivery_desc: Facilitating time exchanges and community connections
privacy.usage_communication_desc: Sending important updates, notifications, and messages from other members
privacy.usage_security_desc: Protecting your account and preventing fraud or abuse
privacy.usage_improvement_desc: Analysing usage patterns to enhance platform features
privacy.no_sell_data: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Your information is never shared with advertisers or data brokers.
privacy.visibility_body_1: Your profile is visible to other verified members of the timebank community. This visibility is essential for facilitating exchanges and building trust within the community.
privacy.visibility_body_2_before: You can control what information appears on your profile through your
privacy.visibility_body_2_after: Some information, like your name and general location, is required for meaningful community participation.
privacy.protection_intro: We implement robust security measures to safeguard your information:
privacy.protect_encryption_desc: All data encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest
privacy.protect_access_desc: Strict internal policies limit data access
privacy.rights_intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have full control over your personal data. Here are your rights:
privacy.right_access_desc: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.right_rectification_desc: Correct any inaccurate or incomplete personal information we hold about you.
privacy.right_erasure_desc: Request deletion of your account and all associated personal data.
privacy.right_portability_desc: Export your data in a structured, machine-readable format (JSON or CSV).
privacy.right_restrict_desc: Request that we limit how we process your data while a concern is being resolved.
privacy.right_withdraw_desc: Withdraw consent for optional data processing at any time without affecting prior processing.
privacy.rights_contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us through our contact page. We will respond to all requests within 30 days.
privacy.cookies_intro: We use cookies to enhance your experience on our platform:
privacy.cookie_essential_desc: Required for login, security, and basic platform functionality. Cannot be disabled.
privacy.cookie_preference_desc: Remember your settings such as theme preference, language, and display options.
privacy.cookie_analytics_desc: Help us understand how people use the platform so we can improve features. All data is anonymised.
privacy.cookies_no_ads_after: use advertising cookies or share data with ad networks. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings. For more details, see our
privacy.retention_intro: We retain your data only as long as necessary:
privacy.retention_active_desc: Data is kept while your account remains active
privacy.retention_deleted_desc: Personal data is removed within 30 days of account deletion
privacy.retention_transactions_desc: May be retained for up to 7 years for legal and audit purposes
privacy.retention_logs_desc: IP addresses and access logs retained for 12 months
privacy.cta_body: We are here to help. If you have any questions about this policy or want to exercise your data rights, please do not hesitate to reach out.

cookies.meta_description: Information about how we use cookies to improve your experience on our platform.
cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies on our platform
cookies.what_are_body_1: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the owners of the site.
cookies.what_are_body_2: {{name}} uses cookies and similar technologies to ensure you get the best experience on our platform. This policy explains which cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can control them.
cookies.cat_essential_desc: These cookies are strictly necessary for the platform to function. They enable core functionality such as authentication, security, and session management. Without these cookies, the platform cannot operate properly.
cookies.cat_analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the platform by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve the platform experience for everyone.
cookies.cat_preference_desc: These cookies remember your preferences and settings to provide a more personalised experience. They allow the platform to remember choices you make such as theme, language, and display options.
cookies.no_marketing: We do not use marketing or advertising cookies. We never share your data with advertisers or ad networks.
cookies.cookie_session_purpose: Maintains your authenticated session across page loads
cookies.cookie_csrf_purpose: Protects against cross-site request forgery attacks
cookies.cookie_token_purpose: JWT authentication token for API requests
cookies.cookie_refresh_purpose: Refresh token for seamless session renewal
cookies.cookie_locale_purpose: Stores language and regional format preference
cookies.cookie_consent_purpose: Stores your cookie consent preferences (categories accepted)
cookies.cookie_sentry_purpose: Error tracking and performance monitoring (only with analytics consent)
cookies.third_party_intro: In some cases, we use third-party services that may set their own cookies. These services include:
cookies.third_party_sentry_desc: Error tracking and performance monitoring (only active with analytics consent)
cookies.third_party_pusher_desc: For real-time notifications and messaging functionality
cookies.third_party_compliance: We carefully select our third-party partners and ensure they comply with applicable data protection regulations. Third-party cookies are governed by the respective third party's privacy policy.
cookies.manage_intro: You can control and manage cookies in several ways. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your user experience and some functionality may no longer be available.
cookies.manage_warning: Disabling essential cookies will prevent you from logging in and using core platform features. We recommend keeping essential cookies enabled.
cookies.browser_settings_intro: Most web browsers allow you to manage cookies through their settings. Here is where to find cookie settings in popular browsers:
cookies.browser_chrome_path: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies and other site data
cookies.browser_firefox_path: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
cookies.browser_edge_path: Settings > Cookies and site permissions > Cookies and site data
cookies.cta_body: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or this policy, please do not hesitate to contact us.

accessibility.meta_description: Our commitment to making the platform accessible to everyone, following WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
accessibility.heading: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.subtitle: {{name}} is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people of all abilities.
accessibility.commitment_body_1: We believe that the internet should be accessible to everyone, regardless of ability or disability. {{name}} strives to ensure that our platform meets or exceeds the requirements of the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA.
accessibility.commitment_body_2: We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards to ensure we provide equal access to all of our users.
accessibility.feature_keyboard_desc: Full keyboard support including skip links, focus indicators, and logical tab order
accessibility.feature_visual_desc: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio, resizable text, and no colour-only information
accessibility.feature_screen_reader_desc: Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, and meaningful alt text for all images
accessibility.feature_responsive_desc: Content adapts to all screen sizes and supports up to 200% zoom without loss of functionality
accessibility.conformance_body_1: The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA.
accessibility.conformance_body_2_after: with WCAG 2.1 Level AA. Partially conformant means that some parts of the content do not fully conform to the accessibility standard.
accessibility.feedback_intro: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of {{name}}. Please let us know if you encounter accessibility barriers:
accessibility.feedback_email_desc: Use our contact form to report issues
accessibility.feedback_response_desc: We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days
accessibility.feedback_updates_desc: We will notify you of progress towards resolving the issue
accessibility.tech_intro: Accessibility of {{name}} relies on the following technologies to work with the particular combination of web browser and any assistive technologies or plugins installed on your computer:
accessibility.tech_recommendation: These technologies are relied upon for conformance with the accessibility standards used. We recommend using the latest version of your browser with up-to-date assistive technology for the best experience.
accessibility.last_updated: This statement was last updated on February 2026.

hub.heading: Legal & Compliance
hub.subtitle: Transparency and trust are at the heart of everything we do. Here you will find all of our legal documents and policies.
hub.commitment_body_1: {{name}} is fully committed to GDPR compliance and data protection best practices. We believe you have the right to understand exactly how your data is collected, processed, and stored.
hub.commitment_body_2_before: Every policy below has been written in
hub.commitment_body_2_after: so that it is genuinely useful, not just legally required. If anything is unclear, our team is always happy to help.
hub.doc_privacy_desc: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information. Includes your GDPR rights and data retention policies.
hub.doc_terms_desc: The rules and guidelines governing your use of the platform, including member responsibilities and community standards.
hub.doc_cookies_desc: Details about the cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can manage your cookie preferences.
hub.doc_accessibility_desc: Our commitment to making the platform accessible to everyone, including WCAG 2.1 AA compliance details.
hub.doc_community_guidelines_desc: The standards and expectations for respectful, constructive participation in our community.
hub.doc_acceptable_use_desc: What constitutes acceptable and prohibited use of the platform, including content and conduct rules.
hub.cta_body: If you have any questions about our legal documents, data practices, or want to exercise your GDPR rights, please get in touch.

platform.provider_notice_body: This document governs the relationship between you and Project NEXUS (the platform provider). It is separate from any terms established by {{tenant}} (your community operator).
platform.cta_body: If you have questions about this platform-level document, contact the Project NEXUS team. For questions about your community's policies, contact {{tenant}} directly.

gate.consent_text: By clicking Accept, you confirm you have read and agree to the documents listed above.
